Package neqsim.process.diagnostics

Class SimulationVerifier

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.diagnostics.SimulationVerifier
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class SimulationVerifier extends Object implements Serializable
Verifies root-cause hypotheses by perturbing a cloned process model.

The verifier is conservative: unsupported hypotheses receive a neutral score with an explicit limitation rather than a false positive verification.

Version:
1.1
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • SimulationVerifier

      public SimulationVerifier(ProcessSystem baseProcess, String equipmentName)
      Creates a simulation verifier.
      Parameters:
      baseProcess - the base process system, cloned before perturbation
      equipmentName - name of the equipment being diagnosed

  • Method Details

    • setHistorianData

      public void setHistorianData(Map<String,double[]> data)
      Sets the historian data for comparison.
      Parameters:
      data - parameter name to time-series values

    • verify

      public void verify(Hypothesis hypothesis)
      Verifies a hypothesis by simulation.
      Parameters:
      hypothesis - hypothesis to verify

    • applyPerturbation

      private SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult applyPerturbation(ProcessSystem process, Hypothesis hypothesis)
      Applies a perturbation to the cloned process matching the hypothesis.
      Parameters:
      process - cloned process to modify
      hypothesis - hypothesis dictating which perturbation to apply
      Returns:
      perturbation result with status and explanation

    • findEquipment

      private ProcessEquipmentInterface findEquipment(ProcessSystem process)
      Finds the diagnosed equipment in a process.
      Parameters:
      process - process system
      Returns:
      equipment, or null if not found

    • perturbCompressor

      private SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult perturbCompressor(Compressor compressor, String failureMode, Hypothesis.Category category)
      Applies a compressor perturbation with graduated severity based on failure mode.
      Parameters:
      compressor - compressor to perturb
      failureMode - lower-case failure mode text
      category - hypothesis category
      Returns:
      perturbation result

    • perturbPump

      private SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult perturbPump(Pump pump, String failureMode, Hypothesis.Category category)
      Applies a pump perturbation.
      Parameters:
      pump - pump to perturb
      failureMode - lower-case failure mode text
      category - hypothesis category
      Returns:
      perturbation result

    • perturbCooler

      private SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult perturbCooler(Cooler cooler, String failureMode, Hypothesis.Category category)
      Applies a cooler perturbation.
      Parameters:
      cooler - cooler to perturb
      failureMode - lower-case failure mode text
      category - hypothesis category
      Returns:
      perturbation result

    • perturbHeater

      private SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult perturbHeater(Heater heater, String failureMode, Hypothesis.Category category)
      Applies a heater perturbation.
      Parameters:
      heater - heater to perturb
      failureMode - lower-case failure mode text
      category - hypothesis category
      Returns:
      perturbation result

    • perturbHeatExchanger

      private SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult perturbHeatExchanger(HeatExchanger heatExchanger, String failureMode, Hypothesis.Category category)
      Applies a heat exchanger perturbation.

      When the equipment is a generic HeatExchanger (not Cooler or Heater), applies fouling or tube-leak perturbations by adjusting UA values or flow parameters.

      Parameters:
      heatExchanger - heat exchanger to perturb
      failureMode - lower-case failure mode text
      category - hypothesis category
      Returns:
      perturbation result

    • perturbSeparator

      private SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult perturbSeparator(Separator separator, String failureMode, Hypothesis.Category category)
      Applies a separator perturbation.
      Parameters:
      separator - separator to perturb
      failureMode - lower-case failure mode text
      category - hypothesis category
      Returns:
      perturbation result

    • perturbValve

      private SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult perturbValve(ThrottlingValve valve, String failureMode, Hypothesis.Category category)
      Applies a valve perturbation.
      Parameters:
      valve - valve to perturb
      failureMode - lower-case failure mode text
      category - hypothesis category
      Returns:
      perturbation result

    • readKpis

      private Map<String,Double> readKpis(ProcessAutomation auto)
      Reads common KPIs from a process via automation.
      Parameters:
      auto - process automation facade
      Returns:
      map of KPI name to value

    • readKpi

      private void readKpi(ProcessAutomation auto, String address, String key, String unit, Map<String,Double> kpis)
      Reads one KPI and stores it if available.
      Parameters:
      auto - process automation facade
      address - automation address
      key - output key
      unit - requested unit, or empty for native unit
      kpis - target KPI map

    • compareToHistorian

      private double compareToHistorian(Map<String,Double> baseline, Map<String,Double> modified)
      Compares modified simulation results to historian data patterns.
      Parameters:
      baseline - baseline KPI values
      modified - modified KPI values after perturbation
      Returns:
      match score in range 0 to 1

    • findHistorianValuesForKpi

      private double[] findHistorianValuesForKpi(String kpi)
      Finds historian values matching a simulated KPI key.
      Parameters:
      kpi - simulated KPI key
      Returns:
      historian values, or null if no alias matches

    • areKnownAliases

      private boolean areKnownAliases(String normalizedKpi, String normalizedTag)
      Checks known historian aliases for common process KPIs.
      Parameters:
      normalizedKpi - normalized KPI name
      normalizedTag - normalized historian tag name
      Returns:
      true if the names are known aliases

    • buildSummary

      private String buildSummary(SimulationVerifier.PerturbationResult perturbation, Map<String,Double> baseline, Map<String,Double> modified, double score)
      Builds the simulation verification summary.
      Parameters:
      perturbation - perturbation that was applied
      baseline - baseline KPI values
      modified - modified KPI values
      score - verification score
      Returns:
      summary text

    • normalize

      private String normalize(String text)
      Normalizes text for alias matching.
      Parameters:
      text - text to normalize
      Returns:
      lower-case alphanumeric text
